hero.subtitle: I combine hands-on frontend engineering with delivery leadership to help organizations increase delivery speed and product quality through technical excellence and strong team leadership.
hero.portraitparagraph2: Building polished UX with strong delivery rhythm

signals.label: developing core SaaS features in a production environment
improved efficiency through optimized frontend workflows and better team alignment
building scalable, reusable components with a focus on performance

about.title: From idea to working product
about.description: I focus on building modern web applications using React, TypeScript, and Next.js, with strong attention to code quality, performance, and usability. I specialize in simplifying complex problems and turning them into intuitive user interfaces. I work closely with designers and stakeholders to ensure that delivered features are consistent, thoughtful, and truly useful.
highlights: In team environments, I focus on clear communication, solid organization, and continuous improvements that make collaboration smoother and more predictable.

proof.title: A More Human Way To Show Range
proof.description: This section turns core strengths into interactive signals instead of a flat list. Each bubble stands for a pattern I bring into teams and products.

items.label: Delivery Rhythm
items.description: I help teams build a repeatable cadence where planning, execution, and follow-through stay aligned sprint after sprint.

items.label: Frontend Ownership
items.description: I enjoy shaping polished interfaces, keeping codebases clear, and turning product intent into reliable user-facing experiences.

items.label: Process Clarity
items.description: I look for friction in workflows, dependencies, and team rituals, then simplify the system so momentum becomes easier to sustain.

items.label: Client Trust
items.description: Longer relationships usually come from consistent communication, calm execution, and a strong sense of ownership over outcomes.

items.label: Cross-Functional Bridge
items.metric: Product, design, and engineering in sync
items.description: I naturally connect disciplines, reduce ambiguity, and keep teams moving toward the same version of success.

items.label: 100% sprint goal completion
items.description: Led a 5-person cross-functional team with consistent delivery discipline.

items.label: team efficiency uplift
items.description: Improved predictability and flow through process and impediment optimization.

items.label: client retention
items.description: Built long-term relationships and reliable value delivery as founder.

items.title: SaaS Delivery Leadership
items.description: Combined Scrum leadership and frontend collaboration to keep delivery stable, predictable, and aligned with business priorities.

items.title: Workflow & Velocity Optimization
items.description: Introduced process improvements and impediment removal routines that lifted team efficiency and planning confidence.

items.title: Stakeholder Feedback Engine
items.description: Established regular demos and tighter feedback loops to speed up decision-making and reduce delivery risk.
